title: Unsupported: Assert not allowed under another assert for assert(std::randomize() with

features.name: nested assert with std::randomize with constraint
features.description: Code should include an assert statement containing another assert that uses std::randomize() with a constraint block

features.name: countones in assert constraint
features.description: Code should include a $countones function call within an assert statement's constraint block using std::randomize with

features.name: bitwise operations in assert randomize constraint
features.description: Code should include bitwise NOT (~) and AND (&) operations within a std::randomize with constraint in an assert statement
